text: There is a steady rhythm to the repetition of 'the ~~~,' echoing in my ears like a meditative mantra. I stand in a modern, brightly-lit space dominated by glass, sharp geometric lines, and visual displays about R&D. I feel surrounded by intention and inquiry. The formal, almost clinical ambiance of the corridor outside the meeting room is offset by the vibrant, energetic design of the exhibit. Here, curiosity hums beneath the surface. I am both an observer and a participant in this dance of knowledge and discovery, caught between sterile order and creative explosion. I feel transfixed, aware of my role in this unfolding process of understanding.
